headline: Trump extends ceasefire to give Iran more time to negotiate
description: The blockade of ports on Iran's coast in the Strait of Hormuz will remain in place, the US president said on Tuesday, while the US military will 'in all other respects, remain ready and able.'

Outrage in Turkey after two school shootings
description: A 19-year-old man and a 13-year-old boy opened fire on students on April 14 and 15. Investigations are ongoing, but many believe the government failed to anticipate these tragedies and point to systemic violence in the country's schools.

headline: Israeli films caught between calls for boycott and government threats
description: Their access to international festivals and co-productions has become increasingly complicated as Israel's image has deteriorated since the war of destruction in Gaza that followed the October 7 terrorist attack. The culture minister, for his part, is threatening to cut off state funding.

headline: Louvre showcases 'beautiful unknown' Martin Schongauer, who influenced Michelangelo and Rembrandt
description: An outstanding exhibition brings together around 100 works by the engraver and painter, who was born in Colmar around 1445, all showcasing his exceptional mastery.

headline: 'Why am I alive?': The Yazidi genocide as told by one of its survivors
description: Samih Taha, now a refugee in France, is one of the few survivors of the Islamic State group massacre of his village in northern Iraq on August 15, 2014. Then 17 years old, he went into debt to buy back his mother and sisters, who had been forced into sexual slavery. He told Le Monde his story and the tragedy that befell his family.
